items.title: Germany wants to put TikTok 'in European hands'
items.summary: The EU told TikTok in February that it needed to change its "addictive design" or risk heavy fines
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.summary: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.

items.title: How Flent and Cashfree Payments are rewriting the rules of renting in India
items.summary: As Flent sets out to turn renting into a managed, move-in-ready experience, Cashfree Payments is the infrastructure making it scale.
